name: Rothy's
one_liner: Rothy's is a direct-to-consumer sustainable footwear and accessories brand that 3D-knits shoes, handbags, and accessories from recycled plastic bottles.

ambiguities: Headcount estimates vary widely across sources (190 per PitchBook, 259 per Compworth, 316 per LeadIQ as of Sep 2025, ~1,000 per LeadIQ as of Apr 2025, 501–1,000 per ZoomInfo/Crunchbase); 750 used as midpoint estimate for combined HQ + retail + factory staff.

Total funding raised is contested: Crunchbase/EquityZen show $44M (primary capital only), Tracxn/TexAu show $242M (including secondary transactions), PitchBook shows $515M (includes the full $275M secondary share purchase by Alpargatas). The $242M figure reflects confirmed primary capital rounds per Tracxn.
The $275M Alpargatas secondary share purchase went to existing shareholders, not Rothy's balance sheet, hence excluded from primary funding total.
Founded year is consistently cited as 2012 (founding) with product launch in 2016.
